privileged_info_summary: The stop_and_restart_stream task requires creation of a log file at /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/stream_lifecycle_log.txt containing exactly four fields: stream_started, stream_stopped, stream_restarted, and status with value 'complete', all using Unix timestamps. The minimum duration between stream stop and restart must be at least 3 seconds. No external datasets are involved; the task uses OpenBCI GUI's built-in synthetic (algorithmic) data generation mode.
